title: HMW DNA Extraction from Red Algae for Long Read Sequencing
author: Benoît Vacherie
materials: QC results obtained on different species.

steps.title: Extraction Buffer
steps.instruction: Extraction Buffer : Prepare 10 mL of extraction buffer (per 200g of material) in a 50 mL tube %s %s

steps.title: Add 10 ml of extraction buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 10 ml of extraction buffer to a 50 ml tube. 10 mL, Extraction buffer

steps.title: Put a mortar in ice
steps.instruction: Put a mortar in ice. Cool the mortar and pestle with liquid nitrogen until the bubbling stops. Liquid Nitrogen Contributed by users

steps.title: Grind 200 mg of frozen sample...
steps.instruction: Grind 200 mg of frozen sample to a fine powder (approx. 2 min). 200 mg, Sample

steps.title: Transfer the powder to the extraction buffer
steps.instruction: Transfer the powder to the extraction buffer

steps.title: Add 20 µl of Beta-mercaptoethanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µl of Beta-mercaptoethanol to the extraction buffer and vortex 5 sec. Beta-mercaptoethanol Contributed by users Catalog #97622-10X1ML

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 1...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 1 h with agitation (300 rpm).

steps.title: Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a new 50 ml tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a new 50 ml tube.

steps.title: Add to the supernatant
steps.instruction: Add to the supernatant : 0.1 volume (1 ml) of absolute ethanol Ethanol absolute Contributed by users (CAS: 64-17-5) 0.25 volume (2.5 ml) of 3M potassium acetate Potassium Acetate Contributed by users 1 volume (10 ml) of chloroform isoamyl alcoho l Chloroform:Isoamyl Alcohol [24:1] Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #25666 Vortex 2x 5 sec

steps.title: Incubate for 20 min at -20°C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 20 min at -20°C

steps.title: Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6

steps.title: Gently transfer the aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Gently transfer the aqueous phase to a new 50 ml tube.

steps.title: Add 2µl of RNase A (100mg/ml)...
steps.instruction: Add 2µl of RNase A (100mg/ml) RNAse A (DNAse free) 100mg/ml Qiagen Catalog #19101

steps.title: Incubate for 30 min at 37°C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 30 min at 37°C

steps.title: Add 1 volume (10 ml) of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume (10 ml) of chloroform isoamyl alcohol Chloroform:Isoamyl Alcohol [24:1] Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #25666 Vortex 2x 5 sec

steps.title: Incubate for 20 min at -20°C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 20 min at -20°C

steps.title: Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6

steps.title: Gently transfer the aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Gently transfer the aqueous phase to a new 50 ml tube.

steps.title: Beta-mercaptoethanol Contributed by users Catalog #97622-10X1ML...
steps.instruction: Beta-mercaptoethanol Contributed by users Catalog #97622-10X1ML Add to the supernatant : 0.8 volume (≈ 8 ml) of isopropano l Isopropanol Contributed by users 0.1 volume (≈ 1 ml) of 3M sodium acetate Sodium acetate, 3M Fisher Scientific Catalog #J61928 0.2% (≈ 2 µl) of β-mercaptoethanol Beta-mercaptoethanol Contributed by users Catalog #97622-10X1ML

steps.title: Homogenise by inversion and incubate for 1 hour at -20°C
steps.instruction: Homogenise by inversion and incubate for 1 hour at -20°C.

steps.title: Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6

steps.title: Carefully discard the supernatant , gently...
steps.instruction: Carefully discard the supernatant , gently resuspend the pellet with 1 ml of cold 70% ethanol. 70% ethanol Contributed by users

steps.title: Transfer the resuspended DNA to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the resuspended DNA to a 1.5 ml DNA LoBind tube. DNA LoBind Tubes 1.5 ml Eppendorf Catalog #022431021

steps.title: Centrifuge with low deceleration 5000 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge with low deceleration 5000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6

steps.title: Carefully discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Carefully discard the supernatant. Air dry the pellet at RT for about 5-10 minutes.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 50-100 µl of 1X TE buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 50-100 µl of 1X TE buffer. Buffer TE 1x Contributed by users

steps.title: Allow the DNA to resuspend for...
steps.instruction: Allow the DNA to resuspend for 2 hours at 55°C or ON at RT.

steps.title: Store the DNA at 4°C
steps.instruction: Store the DNA at 4°C.

steps.title: Quantify your sample with a Qubit DNA HS assay
steps.instruction: Quantify your sample with a Qubit DNA HS assay .Check the purity of the sample with a Nanodrop (measurements of 260/280 and 260/230 absorbance ratios).Estimate the molecular weight of the sample with a Tapestation and/or a Femto pulse.

steps.title: Depending on the DNA concentrations and...
steps.instruction: Depending on the DNA concentrations and DNA length profiles, deplete short DNA molecules using SRE size selection kits (SRE XS, SRE or SRE XL kits).
